seo.title: Healthcare Marketing Pricing — Retainer Tiers from $5K/Month
seo.description: Transparent monthly retainers for healthcare marketing — Starter $5K, Growth $10K, Scale custom. No ad-spend markup, no setup fees, month-to-month after a 90-day setup.

hero.srH1: Healthcare Marketing Pricing — Transparent Retainer Tiers from $5,000 per Month

tiers.title: Three tiers. One philosophy: outcomes over hours.
tiers.subtitle: All retainers are HIPAA-compliant by default with a 30-day launch sprint. Choose the tier that matches your scale and growth velocity.

starter.name: Starter Care
starter.tagline: Perfect for elective procedures and high-research patient journeys.
starter.bestFor: Single-location clinics ready to build their digital foundation.

growth.name: Growth Pro
growth.tagline: High-acuity, rapid-response systems for immediate-need facilities.
growth.bestFor: Clinics ready to scale acquisition fast.
includes: Full-channel Google Ads (Search · PMax · YouTube · LSA)

scale.name: Scale Elite
scale.tagline: Comprehensive growth engine for large healthcare networks.

comparison.title: See exactly what each tier includes.
comparison.subtitle: Side-by-side breakdown across all features — from foundational SEO to enterprise-grade infrastructure and dedicated development teams.

includes.title: Not just services. A full-stack growth team.
includes.subtitle: Every retainer integrates an entire department of medical growth experts into your clinic — with HIPAA infrastructure and onboarding included.

team.title: An entire growth department.
team.text: Dedicated Ads Manager, SEO Strategist, Medical Content Writer, and Social Media Manager — not isolated freelancers.

launch.title: Tangible results in month one.
launch.text: Technical audit, CRM/EHR integration, HIPAA-compliant call tracking, AI chatbot deployment, and first campaign launches — all in 30 days.

hipaa.title: Compliance built in, not billed extra.
hipaa.text: BAAs signed at signup, encrypted servers, secure data routing — full HIPAA compliance with zero hidden fees.

faqs.intro: What the retainer actually covers, how ad spend works, what you're committing to, and when the math typically pays back — written for the people signing the cheque.

still.title: Not sure which tier fits?
still.p1: Send us your current ad spend, patient LTV, and the one number you'd most like to move — we'll recommend Starter, Growth, or Scale on the call. No template proposals.
still.p2: One 30-minute call. You leave with a tier recommendation, an ad-spend range, and a 90-day revenue target.

included.q: What is actually included in the monthly retainer?
included.aBefore: Every tier covers the full growth stack we're running on your behalf —
included.aBold1: strategy, local SEO, Google Business Profile management, paid media management on Google & Meta, content production, server-side conversion tracking, monthly reporting, and a dedicated point of contact
included.aAfter: . Higher tiers add advanced AI call handling, multi-location orchestration, and 24/7 monitoring. Ad spend, custom software builds, and one-off website rebuilds are scoped separately.

adSpend.q: Is ad spend included in the retainer, or do I pay Google & Meta separately?
adSpend.aMid: The retainer covers our team time — strategy, creative, campaign builds, optimisation, tracking, and reporting. Ad budget is billed directly to your card by Google and Meta so you keep full ownership of the accounts, the audit trail, and the historical data. Typical starting ad budgets run
adSpend.aAfter: depending on tier, market, and service lines, and we'll recommend a number that's defensible against your patient-LTV math.

contract.q: What is the minimum contract length and can I cancel?
contract.aMid: — SEO, review velocity, and audience-warming work need at least that to compound and prove out. After day 90 you're on a
contract.aAfter: , cancel anytime with written notice. We hand back full ownership of ad accounts, GBP, website, and every asset we built. No clawbacks, no "agency lock" contracts.

scaleElite.q: How is Scale Elite priced — what makes it "custom"?
scaleElite.aBold1: multi-location groups, DSOs, and healthcare networks
scaleElite.aMid: where the marketing engine has to coordinate across sites, payer mixes, and service lines. Pricing is scoped to location count, ad-spend tier, and whether the engagement includes
scaleElite.aBold2: custom software, EHR integrations, AI triage builds, or multi-state compliance work
scaleElite.aMid2: . Most Scale Elite retainers land between

roi.aBefore: Local Pack and GBP wins typically show in
roi.aMid: . Paid media bridges the gap from week one so booked appointments start moving immediately. Most clients cross retainer break-even on net-new patient revenue between
roi.aMid2: ; SEO and content compound through month 6+. We model the LTV-to-spend math during onboarding and put a
roi.aBold3: specific revenue target on every quarter
roi.aAfter: — if we miss the target two quarters in a row, the next quarter is on us.

cta.text: Get a free 30-minute consultation with a senior practitioner. We'll audit your current funnel, recommend the right tier for your scale, and outline a custom roadmap — no commitment.
